import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def train_model(data):
    loss = compute_loss(data)
    accuracy = compute_accuracy(data)
    logger.info("Training - loss: %.4f, accuracy: %.2%%", loss, accuracy)
    return loss, accuracy


def evaluate(model, test_data):
    precision = compute_precision(model, test_data)
    recall = compute_recall(model, test_data)
    f1 = 2 * precision * recall / (precision + recall)
    logger.info("Evaluation - precision: %.4f, recall: %.4f, f1: %.4f", precision, recall, f1)
    return f1


def compute_loss(data):
    return 0.5


def compute_accuracy(data):
    return 0.95


def compute_precision(model, data):
    return 0.92


def compute_recall(model, data):
    return 0.88
